title: cryptantha spathulata
intro: Cryptantha spathulata, also known as Spurred Cryptantha, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cryptantha spathulata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Cryptantha spathulata often include making teas or infusions from the plant's leaves and flowers, and it can also be used in salves or tinctures for topical application.
